d.t: Gặp gỡ: Nói về từ lóng

e.p: Do you use the word 'cool'?
e.m: Nói 'Yes' hoặc 'No' nếu bạn dùng từ này.
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: Yes, I use the word cool.

e.p: What does 'cool' mean here?
e.m: Nói một nghĩa đơn giản cho 'cool'.
e.h: It means + adjective/noun
e.s: It means good.

e.p: Is 'cool' a polite word?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' cho tính lịch sự.
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: No, it is not very formal.

e.p: Who says 'cool' more, kids or adults?
e.h: Say one word: kids / adults
e.s: Kids say it more.

e.p: Can you teach me one slang word?
e.m: Viết một từ lóng ngắn bạn biết.
e.h: One short word
e.s: Cool is a simple slang word.

e.p: What does 'mate' mean?
e.h: It means + noun
e.s: It means friend.

e.p: Is 'mate' only for men?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: No, it is not only for men.

e.p: Do people say 'mate' at school?
e.m: Nói 'Yes' hoặc 'No' nếu bạn thấy đúng.
e.h: Yes/No + people say / people do not say
e.s: Yes, people say it at school.

e.p: How do you use 'mate' in one sentence?
e.m: Viết một câu đơn dùng từ 'mate'.
e.h: Use 'I' or 'You' + verb + mate
e.s: I call my friend mate.

e.p: Is 'mate' formal or informal?
e.h: One word: formal / informal
e.s: It is informal.

e.p: Do you understand this slang word?
e.h: Yes/No + I understand / I do not understand
e.s: No, I do not understand.

e.p: Can you say it again slowly?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' nếu bạn có thể lặp lại.
e.h: Yes/No + I can / I cannot
e.s: Yes, I can say it again slowly.

e.p: Do you want a simple word instead?
e.m: Nói 'Yes' hoặc 'No' nếu bạn muốn từ đơn giản.
e.h: Yes/No + I want / I don't want
e.s: Yes, I want a simple word.

e.p: Is the word easy to say?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' theo ý bạn.
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, it is easy to say.

e.p: Do you know a similar simple word?
e.m: Viết một từ đơn giản tương tự.
e.h: One simple word
e.s: Good is a similar simple word.

d.t: Nói bạn có dùng từ lóng không

e.p: Do you use slang with your friends?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: Yes, I use slang with my friends.

e.p: When do you use slang?
e.m: Nói một nơi hoặc thời điểm ngắn (ví dụ: at school, at home).
e.h: Use 'at' + place or time
e.s: I use slang at home.

e.p: Do your parents like slang?
e.h: Yes/No + they like / they do not like
e.s: No, they do not like slang.

e.p: Do you use slang in class?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: No, I do not use slang in class.

e.p: Who do you teach a slang word to?
e.m: Nói một người bạn hoặc gia đình ngắn gọn.
e.h: My friend / my brother
e.s: I teach it to my friend.

d.t: Ở trường: Từ lóng trẻ em

e.p: Do kids say 'wow' at school?
e.h: Yes/No + kids say / kids do not say
e.s: Yes, kids say wow at school.

e.p: Is 'wow' a happy word?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, it is a happy word.

e.p: Do teachers use 'wow' in class?
e.h: Yes/No + teachers use / teachers do not use
e.s: No, teachers do not use it much.

e.p: Can you say 'wow' now?
e.h: Use 'wow' in one short sentence
e.s: Wow, this is good.

e.p: Is 'wow' used to show surprise?
e.h: Yes/No + it shows + noun
e.s: Yes, it shows surprise.

d.t: Nơi làm việc: Lời nói lịch sự

e.p: Do people use slang at work?
e.m: Nói 'Yes' hoặc 'No' nếu bạn thấy đúng.
e.h: Yes/No + people use / people do not use
e.s: No, people do not use slang at work.

e.p: Is formal speech better at the office?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, formal speech is better at the office.

e.p: Do you say 'thanks' or a slang word?
e.m: Nói bạn dùng 'thanks' hay từ lóng.
e.h: Use one word: thanks / slang
e.s: I use thanks.

e.p: Can you teach a polite phrase?
e.m: Viết một cụm từ lịch sự ngắn.
e.h: One short phrase
e.s: Please, may I help?

e.p: Do you feel good when people are polite?
e.h: Yes/No + I feel + adjective
e.s: Yes, I feel good.

e.p: Do you use short words online?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: Yes, I use short words online.

e.p: Do you use emoji when you chat?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: Yes, I use emoji when I chat.

e.p: Is online slang easy to learn?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, it is easy to learn.

e.p: Do you say 'lol' or 'haha'?
e.m: Chọn một trong hai để trả lời.
e.h: One short option: lol / haha
e.s: I say haha.

e.p: Do you use slang in a message to a teacher?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: No, I do not use slang to a teacher.

d.t: Bạn bè bình luận về ngôn ngữ

e.p: Does your friend use many slang words?
e.h: Yes/No + my friend uses / does not use
e.s: Yes, my friend uses many slang words.

e.p: Do you like your friend's words?
e.h: Yes/No + I like / I don't like
e.s: Yes, I like my friend's words.

e.p: Do you laugh when a friend uses slang?
e.h: Yes/No + I laugh / I do not laugh
e.s: Yes, I laugh when my friend uses slang.

e.p: Do you tell a friend a new slang word?
e.h: Yes/No + I tell / I do not tell
e.s: Yes, I tell my friend a new word.

e.p: Is your friend happy with slang learning?
e.h: Yes/No + they are / they are not
e.s: Yes, they are happy.

d.t: Khen ai đó bằng lời lóng

e.p: Can you say 'Nice' to a friend?
e.h: Yes/No + I can / I cannot
e.s: Yes, I can say nice to a friend.

e.p: Do you say 'Nice job' after help?
e.h: Yes/No + I say / I don't say
e.s: Yes, I say nice job after help.

e.p: Is 'nice' a friendly word?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, it is a friendly word.

e.p: Who do you say 'nice' to?
e.m: Nói một người ngắn (ví dụ: friend).
e.h: One noun: friend / teacher
e.s: I say it to my friend.

e.p: Do you use 'nice' online or face to face?
e.m: Nói một nơi: online hoặc face to face.
e.h: One short place
e.s: I use it online.

d.t: Khi ai đó dùng từ thô lỗ

e.p: Do you hear rude words sometimes?
e.h: Yes/No + I hear / I do not hear
e.s: Yes, I hear rude words sometimes.

e.p: Do you feel bad when someone is rude?
e.h: Yes/No + I feel + adjective
e.s: Yes, I feel sad.

e.p: Do you tell them to stop?
e.h: Yes/No + I tell / I do not tell
e.s: No, I do not tell them to stop.

e.p: Is it okay to use rude words at home?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: No, it is not okay at home.

e.p: Who uses rude words more, friends or strangers?
e.h: One word: friends / strangers
e.s: Strangers use them more.

e.p: Do you call your friend by a short name?
e.h: Yes/No + I call / I do not call
e.s: Yes, I call my friend by a short name.

e.p: Do you use a pet name for family?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: No, I do not use a pet name for family.

e.p: Is short name a slang?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: No, it is not slang.

e.p: Do you like when people use short names?
e.h: Yes/No + I like / I don't like
e.s: Yes, I like it.

e.p: Who do you call by short name?
e.h: One noun: my friend / my brother
e.s: I call my friend by a short name.

d.t: Nói bạn không hiểu và cần lặp lại

e.p: I used a new slang word. Do you understand?
e.h: Yes/No + I understand / I do not understand
e.s: No, I do not understand.

e.p: Can you say it again slowly?
e.h: Yes/No + I can / I cannot
e.s: Yes, I can say it again slowly.

e.p: Do you want a simple word?
e.h: Yes/No + I want / I don't want
e.s: Yes, I want a simple word.

e.p: Is the word hard to say?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, it is hard to say.

e.p: Please write one simple word for me.
e.m: Viết một từ đơn giản thay cho từ mới.
e.h: One simple word
e.s: Good is a simple word.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giao tiếp đơn giản về từ lóng

e.p: Do you know the slang 'cool' and 'mate'?
e.m: Nói 'Yes' hoặc 'No' nếu bạn biết cả hai.
e.h: Yes/No + I know / I don't know
e.s: Yes, I know both words.

e.p: Do you use slang with friends and not with teachers?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: Yes, I use slang with friends and not with teachers.

e.p: Is 'cool' a happy or sad word?
e.h: One word: happy / sad
e.s: It is a happy word.

e.p: Do you feel good when people are polite online?
e.h: Yes/No + I feel + adjective
e.s: Yes, I feel good.

e.p: Who do you teach slang to, friend or stranger?
e.h: One word: friend / stranger
e.s: I teach slang to my friend.

d.t: Ôn tập: Lịch sự và không lịch sự

e.p: Is a polite word better at work?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, a polite word is better at work.

e.p: Do you say 'please' and 'thanks' here?
e.h: Yes/No + I say / I don't say
e.s: Yes, I say please and thanks here.

e.p: Do rude words make you sad?
e.h: Yes/No + I feel + adjective
e.s: Yes, they make me sad.

e.p: Can you use polite phrase with a teacher?
e.h: Yes/No + I can / I cannot
e.s: Yes, I can use a polite phrase.

e.p: Do you stop someone who is rude to you?
e.h: Yes/No + I stop / I do not stop
e.s: No, I do not stop them.

d.t: Ôn tập: Trò chuyện hàng ngày

e.p: Do you use short words and emoji with friends?
e.h: Yes/No + I use / I don't use
e.s: Yes, I use short words and emoji with friends.

e.p: Do you teach a simple slang word to a friend now?
e.h: Yes/No + I teach / I do not teach
e.s: Yes, I teach a simple slang word now.

e.p: Is 'good' a simple word to use for praise?
e.h: Yes/No + it is / it is not
e.s: Yes, it is a simple word for praise.

e.p: Do you use slang more at home or at school?
e.h: One word: home / school
e.s: I use slang more at home.

e.p: Do you understand new slang when a friend says it?
e.h: Yes/No + I understand / I do not understand
e.s: Yes, I understand new slang from a friend.
